skill.name: maxhub-tiktok
skill.description: A TikTok data query assistant covering video details, user data, search, ads, creator tools, e-commerce, and interaction modules. Supports both App and Web API endpoints.
skill.summary: Query TikTok data across 7 modules including video, user, search, ads, creators, shop, and interaction via the MaxHub API.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: This skill is a legitimate TikTok data API assistant. Over 3,200 static findings were detected, but all are false positives: the ~2,296 external_command alerts come from backtick-wrapped curl examples in Markdown reference files (not executable code); the 135 network alerts are legitimate MaxHub API endpoints; the 18 env_access alerts document required MAXHUB_API_KEY configuration for API authentication. The skill is transparently documented and follows a read-only data query pattern. Risk level is LOW.

medium_findings.title: External API Credential Usage
medium_findings.description: The skill reads MAXHUB_API_KEY from environment variables and sends it as a Bearer token to a third-party API (aconfig.cn). While legitimate and documented, this means user credentials are transmitted to an external service. Users must trust the service provider.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs in Documentation
low_findings.description: Multiple hardcoded URLs reference the legitimate MaxHub API service (aconfig.cn). These are expected documentation links for the API base URL, signup page, and API endpoint examples. No malicious URLs detected.

low_findings.title: Shell Command Examples in Documentation
low_findings.description: Backtick-wrapped curl commands appear in Markdown documentation as usage examples. These are not executable in the skill runtime context. All commands use hardcoded arguments to demonstrate API calls.

content.user_title: Query TikTok data: videos, users, ads, and trends
content.value_statement: Accessing TikTok data for market analysis and creator research requires complex API integration. This skill provides a unified query interface to 189+ TikTok data endpoints covering video details, user profiles, search, advertising analytics, creator tools, e-commerce, and social interaction metrics via the MaxHub API.
actual_capabilities: Query video details, comments, and engagement metrics from TikTok
Search and analyze TikTok user profiles, followers, and content
Perform keyword, hashtag, and general search across TikTok content
Retrieve ad campaign analytics and creator performance data
Access e-commerce product data, shop details, and reviews
Fetch live stream information, room data, and ranking lists
limitations: Requires a valid MAXHUB_API_KEY from aconfig.cn to function
Data accuracy depends on the third-party MaxHub API provider
Some endpoints require TikTok session cookies with trust implications
Does not perform write operations or automate TikTok account actions

use_cases.title: Cross-Border Product Research
use_cases.description: E-commerce teams can analyze trending TikTok products across regions to identify high-potential items for跨境 campaigns.

use_cases.title: Creator Partnership Evaluation
use_cases.description: Brand teams can evaluate TikTok creator influence, audience quality, and content performance before合作 partnerships.

use_cases.title: Multi-Region Trend Comparison
use_cases.description: Global operations teams can compare content trends across US, Japan, and Southeast Asia markets to inform local strategy.

prompt_templates.title: Quick Video Lookup
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the details and top comments for this TikTok video: [paste video URL or ID]
prompt_templates.scenario: Retrieve video metadata and engagement data for a single video

prompt_templates.title: Creator Profile Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze this TikTok creator: [username]. Show me their follower count, recent post performance, and audience engagement rate.
prompt_templates.scenario: Evaluate a TikTok creator for potential partnership

prompt_templates.title: Trending Hashtag Research
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for trending content under the hashtag #[topic]. List the top 10 videos sorted by engagement and summarize the content patterns.
prompt_templates.scenario: Research popular content themes for content strategy

prompt_templates.title: Competitive Ad Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Find ads in the [category/industry] category. Compare the top 5 ads by engagement rate and identify common creative patterns.

output_examples.input: Show me the top 10 trending videos for hashtag #skincare in the US market
output_examples.output:
## Top 10 #skincare Videos (US Market)

| Rank | Creator | Views | Likes | Key Theme |
|------|---------|-------|-------|-----------|
| 1 | @glowroutine | 2.3M | 185K | Morning routine 5-step |
| 2 | @dermdoctor | 1.8M | 142K | Ingredient breakdown |
| 3 | @kbeautytips | 1.5M | 98K | Product review comparison |

**Key findings:** Tutorial-style videos outperform product showcases. Short under-60 second clips get 40% more engagement.

output_examples.input: Analyze the TikTok ad performance for brand X in the last 30 days
output_examples.output:
## Brand X Ad Performance Summary

- **Total ads active:** 12
- **Top performer:** Product demo ad with 4.8% CTR
- **Average engagement rate:** 3.2% (above category baseline)
- **Best creative pattern:** Before/after comparison format

**Recommendation:** Increase budget allocation to video-first creatives. Static image ads underperform by 60%.

best_practices: Start with a simple query to verify your API key is working before running complex multi-endpoint analyses
Use specific keywords and filters to narrow search results instead of broad queries for faster responses
Combine video metrics with creator profile data to get a complete picture of content performance
anti_patterns: Do not paste raw TikTok session cookies unless you fully trust the service provider - use scoped API tokens instead
Do not attempt to use this skill for automated posting or account management - it is read-only by design
Do not reuse the same API key across untrusted applications or share it in plain text

faq.question: Do I need a paid API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. You need to sign up at aconfig.cn to get a MAXHUB_API_KEY. Free tiers may have rate limits.

faq.question: Can this skill post videos or comments on TikTok?
faq.answer: No. This skill is designed for read-only data queries only. It cannot post, like, follow, or modify TikTok accounts.

faq.question: Which TikTok regions are supported?
faq.answer: The MaxHub API supports multiple regions including US, Japan, Southeast Asia, and Europe. Check the API documentation for specific region availability.

faq.question: Is my API key safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: Your API key is sent as a Bearer token to the MaxHub API service. The skill documentation advises the provider does not store credentials beyond each request.

faq.question: What is the difference between App and Web API modes?
faq.answer: App mode returns data as seen in the TikTok mobile app. Web mode returns data as seen on the TikTok website. Results may differ slightly between modes.

faq.question: How accurate is the data from third-party TikTok APIs?
faq.answer: Data comes from third-party API providers and is for reference only. Metrics may differ from official TikTok Analytics due to sampling and access method differences.
